records.name: Techmatrix

reasons.notes: Convergence-test candidate — human review needed before consolidation.

records.rawExplanation:
*2021 (post-IPO-mania derating begins — partial coverage):* stock ¥1,534 (Aug 2) – ¥2,226 (Apr 14) per Nikkei 10-year history; Apr peak → Aug trough ~-31%. FY3/2021 full-year financial numbers not surfaced via search snippets — partial. Multi-year framing from later coverage ("11 consecutive years of record profit") implies FY3/2021 was a record year too, business-side ◎ on streak-context — but numbers themselves partial. Stock-move catalyst for the Apr peak / Aug trough: not sourced — catalyst needs_human. 業績 (partial, streak-inferred) ◎ / 株価 ✕ by mid-year.

Sign summary: revenue rose on growth; revenue rose on 11-year record-profit streak (inferred); shares fell -31% off April peak; shares fell to ¥1,534 low (Aug 2); business strong, stock depressed.

records.rawExplanation:
*2023 (multi-year derating bottoms — partial coverage):* stock ¥1,341 (Mar 16) – ¥1,905 (Jun 7) — the multi-year low. From Apr 2021 peak ¥2,226 to Mar 2023 trough ¥1,341 = -40% over ~2 years (less severe than Systena's -62% over the same window — TechMatrix held up better through the IT-services derating). FY3/2023 full-year numbers not surfaced. Stock-move catalyst for the Mar 2023 ¥1,341 trough: not sourced — catalyst needs_human (consistent with broader IT-services sector derating 2022–2023). 業績 (partial, streak-inferred) ◎ / 株価 ✕✕ (multi-year low).

Sign summary: revenue rose on growth; revenue rose per streak; shares collapsed to multi-year low; shares fell to ¥1,341 low (Mar 16); business strong, stock depressed.

records.rawExplanation:
*2024 (big rally year — Firmus acquisition timing-correlated but NOT confirmed as catalyst):* FY3/2024 full-year revenue not directly recovered from snippets — partial (announced May 9 2024). Stock ¥1,555 (Jan 31) – ¥2,614 (Nov 12) per Nikkei — a +68% range high, biggest 5-year range. **Stock catalyst:** in November 2024 TechMatrix acquired Malaysian cybersecurity firm Firmus Sdn.Bhd. as a 100% subsidiary. **The ¥2,614 Nov 12 2024 peak is timing-correlated with this Nov 2024 acquisition announcement, but no source explicitly names the Firmus acquisition as THE rally driver — catalyst needs_human verification.** Reading the timing alone risks laundering correlation into a stated cause. 業績 (partial, streak-inferred) ◎ / 株価 ◎ (recovery + rally).

Sign summary: revenue rose on growth; revenue rose per streak; Firmus Sdn.Bhd. cybersecurity acquisition Nov 2024 timing-correlated with rally (catalyst needs human verification); shares rallied to ¥2,614 high (Nov 12); business strong, stock strong.

records.name: Techmatrix

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (record-year confirmation — clean ◎):* FY3/2025 actual (announced May 9, 2025): revenue ¥64,882M (+21.7% YoY, +¥11,578M increase, **record high**), operating profit ¥6,668M (+14.0%, +¥818M), net profit ¥4,060M (+14.7%). **11 consecutive years of record profit** per management context. FY3/2026 guidance: revenue ¥73,000M (+12.5%), OP ¥7,600M (+13.9%), net ¥4,880M (+20.2%). Stock ¥1,720 (Apr 7) – ¥2,584 (Jan 31). Jan 2025 was actually the prior-year-end momentum continuation; through 2025 the stock declined from Jan high to Apr low, then recovered (per the Nikkei range data — high was Jan, low was Apr). Stock-move catalyst: FY3/2025 record results + 11-year streak + raised FY3/2026 guidance + Firmus acquisition contribution. 業績 ◎ on record results + acceleration / 株価 mixed (Jan peak followed by spring decline — profit-taking after the strong 2024 rally is plausible but no source names it).

Cautious side: import-reseller business model dependence on North American technology vendors (FX-sensitive, supplier-relationship risk); Firmus integration risk; concentration in network security as a single growth driver.

Sign summary: revenue rose +21.7% YoY; operating profit rose +14.0%; net profit rose +14.7%; record revenue, record operating profit, 11 consecutive years of record profit; FY3/2026 guidance raised; shares rallied to ¥2,584 high (Jan 31); business strong, stock strong.


Sources:
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/disclosure/tdnr/20250509538002/ (FY3/2025 通期決算補足資料 May 9, 2025)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/disclosure/tdnr/20240131523284/ (FY3/2024 Q3 disclosure)
- https://www.techmatrix.co.jp/ir/upload_file/m005-m005_02/3762_20250509537899_P01_.pdf (FY3/2025 決算短信)
- https://kitaishihon.com/company/3762/business (company segments)
- https://www.buffett-code.com/company/3762/ (company profile)
- https://www.nikkei.com/nkd/company/history/yprice/?scode=3762 (Nikkei 10-year price history)
